race_planner_core.json.purpose: Official race turn/date/course/grade metadata for generated and fallback MANT race planning.

skill_weighting_core.json.purpose: Official skill costs, conditions, tags, categories, ability types, and value hints for weighted scoring.

trainee_profiles_core.json.purpose: Base stats, growth, max stats, aptitudes, colors, and running style for trainee-specific planning.

trainee_skill_profiles.generated.json.purpose: Auto-generated trainee profiles used by Trackblazer planner and weighted skill preview.

support_cards_core.json.purpose: Support card type, rarity, regular effects, and unique effects for support deck scoring.

succession_core.json.purpose: Succession factors, effects, compatibility relation groups, and rental rank costs.

mant_shop_core.json.purpose: Official MANT shop item costs, limits, availability windows, and item effects.

consumers: Smart Race Solver diagnostics / future route pressure scoring
chara_route_core.json.purpose: Official per-trainee route race requirements and conditional race hints.

rival_races_core.json.purpose: Static rival-race hints used when runtime rival payloads are incomplete.

trackblazer_race_rewards_core.json.purpose: Trackblazer coin, win-point, reward-set, fan, and race-group value metadata.

race_performance_rates_core.json.purpose: Official aptitude and mood rate tables for race scoring and logging.

training_effects_core.json.purpose: Official base training effects by scenario, command, level, and result state for training fallback scoring and traces.

scenario_turns_core.json.purpose: Official scenario turn calendar metadata including summer/finale flags, month/half labels, and scenario turn-set mapping.

skill_condition_core.json.purpose: Official skill activation conditions, effect blocks, cost, category, and level coefficients for weighted skill scoring and explanations.

skill_upgrade_groups_core.json.purpose: Official skill group/upgrade chains for white, gold, and unique variants.

skill_sources_core.json.purpose: Official skill source lookup connecting skills to trainee available sets and support-card skill sets.

support_hint_sources_core.json.purpose: Official support-card hint source lookup by support card and by skill.

support_effects_resolved_core.json.purpose: Resolved support-card effects at major level breakpoints plus unique effects, level EXP, and hint counts.

succession_scoring_core.json.purpose: Official inheritance scoring helpers for parent/spark estimation and logging.

career_progression_core.json.purpose: Official career grade requirements by wins, runs, and fans.

event_reward_display_core.json.purpose: Official event reward display helpers for event traces and UI labels.
